questions.question: 8 (a) Alpha (α) particles are directed at a very thin sheet of gold foil. The following observations provide evidence for the nuclear model of the atom. State what conclusions may be made about the model of the atom from these observations. (i) Observation: most of the particles pass straight through the foil. conclusion ......................................................................

questions.question: 10 (a) Sketch a diagram to show the orbital path of a comet around the Sun. Mark the position of the Sun on your diagram using an S. [2] (b) Draw a cross on your diagram to show where the comet is travelling with the slowest speed. Label the cross L. [1] (c) Explain why the speed of a comet changes as it travels around its orbit. Use the conservation of energy in your explanation. .......
